notes: MIF-009 scalar Faraday EMF is measured for Python and Rust after finite-observable validation hardening.
Non-isolated local comparison run on a workstation with powersave governor and nontrivial host load; do not treat as a production performance claim.

benchmark_context.isolation_method: taskset affinity to logical cores 8-11; no kernel isolcpus reservation
benchmark_context.heavy_jobs_running: shared workstation under heavy concurrent load (load average ~38-47, cargo-mutants running); absolute timings are noisy and means are outlier-inflated; the ranking holds across the distribution.
benchmark_context.hardware_summary: x86_64, 12 logical CPUs, 6 cores, 2 threads per core
